metadata.title: Rodrigo P. Martel | Data Strategy Marketing and Digital Transformation
metadata.description: Discover Rodrigo P. Martel's expertise in digital strategy, data analysis, and business intelligence. Transforming data into actionable insights for business growth.
metadata.author: Rodrigo P. Martel

hero.name: Rodrigo P. Martel
hero.bio: I'm a marketing graduate from El Salvador with 5+ years' experience in content creation, social media, email campaigns, and data analysis. I help brands tell their story, grow online, and make data-driven decisions.

education.title: Education
education.description: My journey in Marketing Actionable data and finance began with a Bachelor's Degree in Marketing (emphasis in Analysis) from Universidad Francisco Gavidia. I deepened my technical foundation with:

degrees.title: Diploma in Digital Transformation & Open Government

education.footnote: To stay at the forefront of technology and analytics, I continuously expand my expertise through advanced certifications in SQL, Python for Data Analysis, Advanced Excel, Power BI, Agile Methodologies, Scrum Master, and ongoing Google Project Management. I believe lifelong learning drives innovation and efficiency in marketing, finance, and data strategies.
education.logoExplanation: The RoMartel logo symbolizes my commitment to data analysis and business strategy. The computer screen reflects the tech-driven nature of my work, while the line graph highlights my focus on turning data into actionable insights.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: I create data insights, visualizations, and improve business workflows. I train teams on digital tools, conduct market research, and manage projects using agile methods.

jobs.details: Designed Power BI dashboards for financial KPIs and sales forecasts, trained departments on digital reporting processes, and optimized marketing budgets.
Managed a 15-person support team, analyzed performance metrics to reduce operational costs and introduced efficiency processes that improved the business.
Managed projects, performed risk assessments, and provided strategic decision support to improve business performance.

Executed digital marketing strategies, managed content across platforms, tracked KPIs using Power BI and Google Sheets, and optimized workflows with Trello and Asana. Conducted cost-benefit analyses to support senior management.
Develop and implement predictive analytics models to optimize resource allocation, evaluate AI-generated outputs for reporting accuracy, and test AI systems for data consistency.

Oversaw budgets and financial KPIs for large-scale IT projects with Ooma Granite, MetTel, VikingCloud, and AireSpring, coordinated cross-functional teams, and delivered reports on budget variance, cost-per-ticket, and ROI.
Supervised GIS-based mobile data capture teams, streamlined data collection processes, and produced financial and geographic analyses for central bank studies.
Conducted platform adoption workshops, analyzed learner engagement metrics, and trained professors on data-driven course improvements.

personalProjects.title: Personal Projects
personalProjects.description: I love tackling creative and technical challenges through personal projects that combine data, marketing, and technology.

projects.title: Game-Based Training for Holcim (prototype)
highlights: Developed an interactive simulation to train logistics teams.
Increased training efficiency by 25% using gamification.

projects.title: Sustainable Tech Game Development
highlights: Developed a solar-powered vehicle simulation game, merging sustainability with interactive media.
Showcased problem-solving and creative application of game mechanics in tech projects.

projects.title: Python Mini-Project: Guess the Number
highlights: Built a simple interactive game in Python to enhance logical thinking and coding skills.
Demonstrated adaptability in learning new technologies.

cta.text: Looking to transform your business with data-driven marketing and analytics? Let’s connect and discuss how we can drive growth together!

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: On this page, you can explore some of my certifications, particularly in data analytics. I also hold certifications in social topics, human mobility, and government. I’ve highlighted a few of my data-related certifications. Click the button to access my OneDrive folder and see all of them.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Browse through Rodrigo P. Martel's portfolio showcasing projects in data visualization, digital transformation, Website Design, and strategic growth.

items.question: What is your competitive advantage?
items.answer: My competitive advantage is my mix of marketing expertise, data analysis and IT skills. I can turn complex data into clear insights that support business goals. Plus, I possess a strong commitment to continuous learning and a proactive approach to embracing new challenges.

items.question: What is your background in data analysis?
items.answer: I hold a degree in Marketing with specializations and diplomas in Business Intelligence. I use tools such as Power BI, SQL, and Python to develop data-driven solutions. Additionally, I have certifications in social and humanitarian fields, which help me apply data analysis in ways that positively impact society.

items.question: How do you keep your skills up to date?
items.answer: I believe in lifelong learning and regularly take courses to stay current with the latest trends and technologies in data analysis. I also engage in social and humanitarian projects, continuously expanding my knowledge in these areas to ensure my skills are relevant and impactful.

items.question: How do your technical skills complement your interest in humanitarian work?
items.answer: My technical background in data analysis and project management equips me to approach humanitarian projects with a data-driven mindset, ensuring that efforts are efficient, scalable, and impactful.
